package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAlgorithmicComplexityRecursiveGraphWalkWithoutSeenSet() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_algorithmic_complexity_recursive_graph_walk_without_seen_set"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Algorithmic complexity. Flag recursive graph or tree walks that do not track visited nodes for cyclic or shared inputs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
